description: Auto-computed field for fact evidence level. Agent assigns grade during ingest based on source authority.

grade_levels.when: fact from authoritative source (official docs, project wiki, core maintainer blog)
assertion without confirmation or from weak source (generic blog, forum post)

auto_compute_rules.rule: agent assigns grade during ingest from source authority analysis
grade recorded in page metadata, not body
contradiction resolution priority: documented > corroborated > assertion_only
never set manually — only by agent from source authority analysis
